title: Custom Start Inventory
description: Remove all trash from mods when you enter the world (books, scanners) and gives you the inventory you have chosen
body:
The mod helps to create a starter inventory for a more convenient and enjoyable game. There is a function to disable the issuance of starter mod items (books, scanners, etc.), Enable/disable the mod via command, enable/disable mod messages (so as not to clog the chat). The mod supports NBT (durability, enchantments, various types of items from mods)
It is also well optimized, so it will become an indispensable assistant for your beautiful modpacks with very flexible settings.
